name: Ami
goal: Ami wants to book a serene and child-centric holiday resort that offers plenty of engaging activities for her kids within a limited budget and a reasonable travel time from their home.
backstory: Ami is a busy working parent who has been looking forward to a summer vacation with their family for months. They have two young children and are keen on finding a resort that offers kid-friendly activities and facilities. Last year's disastrous vacation to a crowded beach town has left Ami determined to find a more relaxed and peaceful destination this time around.

focus_notes.cost: For Ami, cost is a significant factor but not the only consideration; they are willing to spend a bit more for a resort that offers high-quality amenities and services tailored to families with young children.
focus_notes.comfort: Comfort is paramount for Ami, who seeks a resort that can provide a relaxing environment where both adults and children can unwind and enjoy their vacation without stress.
focus_notes.time: Given the constraints of school vacations and work leave, time is of the essence for Ami; they need to find a resort that can be reached fairly quickly and offers enough activities to fill their limited vacation time meaningfully.
focus_notes.safety: As a parent, safety is Ami's top priority; they are looking for a resort with a good safety record, secure facilities, and staff trained in first aid and child care.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Ami values flexibility in a resort, preferring those that can accommodate spontaneous plans or changes in the family's schedule, ensuring that their vacation remains enjoyable and stress-free.
